definition: Across six historical General Purpose Technology episodes, infrastructure builders captured primary value in only 1/6 (17% naive). Adjusted to 25-40% for hyperscaler vertical integration (cloud + data + compute + distribution). Market-implied probability of 70-80% represents a conjunction fallacy dramatically exceeding the adjusted base rate.
evidence: 1/6 GPT episodes where infrastructure builders captured value (17% naive)
Hyperscalers control distribution, data, compute, and customer relationships — unprecedented
open_questions: Whether vertical integration genuinely raises the base rate or just delays value leakage
Which specific bottleneck controls are most durable over time
